肝.origin: The flesh radical ⺼ shows this is a body part; it means liver.

肠.origin: The flesh radical ⺼ marks a body part; it means intestines.

股.origin: With the flesh radical ⺼, it first meant thigh, and now also means a share or portion.

肤.origin: The flesh radical ⺼ shows it is part of the body; it means skin.

肩.origin: A person carrying meat ⺼ home for the family 户; it means shoulder.

育.origin: Pictures a mother with a baby ⺼; it means to give birth and to raise.

sentence.en: The teacher is good at educating people.

肺.origin: The flesh radical ⺼ marks a body organ; it means lungs.

sentence.en: Deep breathing is good for the lungs.

肾.origin: The flesh radical ⺼ shows it is a body organ; it means kidney.

肿.origin: The flesh radical ⺼ marks the body; it means swollen.

胀.origin: The flesh radical ⺼ shows it is about the body feeling full or swollen.

sentence.en: My belly feels a bit bloated.

胃.origin: The stomach ⺼ sits behind the belly 田; it means stomach.

胆.origin: The flesh radical ⺼ marks a body organ; it means gallbladder and also courage.

胎.origin: The flesh radical ⺼ shows it relates to the body; it means an unborn baby.

胖.origin: The flesh radical ⺼ marks the body; it means fat or plump.

胡.origin: With the meat radical ⺼; here it means doing things carelessly or wildly.

胯.origin: The flesh radical ⺼ marks a body part; it means the hip or groin area.

sentence.en: There is a cat under his legs.

胰.origin: The flesh radical ⺼ shows it is a body organ; it means pancreas.

sentence.en: The pancreas is a body organ.

胶.origin: Things that connect 交 like flesh ⺼; it means glue or rubber.

sentence.en: I use glue to stick paper.

胸.origin: The flesh radical ⺼ with 匈 inside the chest; it means chest.

脆.origin: Flesh ⺼ in danger 危; it means crisp or fragile.

脉.origin: Long 永 vessels in the body ⺼; it means pulse or vein.

sentence.en: The doctor is taking the pulse.

脑.origin: The flesh radical ⺼ marks a body organ; it means brain.

脓.origin: The flesh radical ⺼ shows it relates to the body; it means pus.

脱.origin: The flesh radical ⺼ with 兑; it means to take off or to shed.

脾.origin: The flesh radical ⺼ marks a body organ; it means spleen, and also temper.

腊.origin: Meat ⺼ kept for the old year 昔; it means cured meat and the last month.

腋.origin: The flesh radical ⺼ marks a body part; it means armpit.

sentence.en: He holds a book under his arm.

腌.origin: Meat ⺼ left 奄 in salt; it means to pickle or to cure.

腐.origin: With the meat radical 肉; it means to rot or to spoil.

腔.origin: The flesh radical ⺼ with 空 (empty); it means a body cavity, like the chest.

腕.origin: The flesh radical ⺼ marks a body part; it means wrist.

sentence.en: He has a watch on his wrist.

腥.origin: With the meat radical ⺼; it means a fishy smell.

sentence.en: This fish has a fishy smell.

腭.origin: The flesh radical ⺼ marks a body part; it means the roof of the mouth, the palate.

sentence.en: The tongue touches the upper palate.

腮.origin: The flesh radical ⺼ marks a body part; it means cheek or jaw.

腱.origin: The flesh radical ⺼ shows it relates to the body; it means tendon.

腹.origin: The flesh radical ⺼ marks a body part; it means belly or abdomen.

腺.origin: The flesh radical ⺼ with 泉 (spring); it means a gland that gives off fluids.

腻.origin: The flesh radical ⺼ shows it relates to fat; it means greasy or oily.

腾.origin: A horse 马 leaping up; it means to soar, to rise, or to make room.

sentence.en: The rocket soared into the sky.

膀.origin: Flesh ⺼ beside 旁 the body; it means upper arm or shoulder.

膈.origin: The flesh radical ⺼ shows it is a body part; it means diaphragm.

膏.origin: The flesh radical ⺼ at the bottom; it means fat, grease, or a thick paste.

膘.origin: The flesh radical ⺼ shows it relates to the body; it means the fat of an animal.

膜.origin: The flesh radical ⺼ shows it is a body part; it means a thin membrane or film.

sentence.en: There is a membrane inside the egg.

膝.origin: The flesh radical ⺼ marks a body part; it means knee.

膻.origin: With the meat radical ⺼; it means the strong smell of mutton.

臀.origin: The flesh radical ⺼ marks a body part; it means buttocks.

sentence.en: His bottom got sore from sitting.

臂.origin: The flesh radical ⺼ marks a body part; it means arm.

臊.origin: With the flesh radical ⺼; here it means shy or embarrassed.

sentence.en: The little sister is very shy.

臣.origin: Pictures a bowing eye, looking down in respect; it means a court official.
